# Bot.Scribe — Escalation File

Scribe writes here when a memory cannot be filed because a required Region or Area does not exist in the brain.
MarcusAurelius reads this file and spawns a completion subprocess to build the missing structure.

**Log location:** `Claude.AI/Bot.Scribe/escalation.md`
**Checked by:** scribe_escalation_check.py (every 5 min via CronCreate)
**Completed by:** MarcusAurelius background subprocess
